tasks.title: Single coconut binary with subcommands (runtime + generate)
tasks.description:
Consolidate coconut-milk + coconut-milk-generators into a single `coconut` binary with subcommands. Keep create-coconut-app as external Lua script.

Architecture:
- `coconut` (default) — launch the app (current runtime behavior)
- `coconut generate` — parse all commands/*.lua + write generated/ files
- `coconut new` — (future, not in this batch)
- `create-coconut-app` — stays external Lua script; not absorbed

tasks.title: Rename binary target from coconut-milk to coconut
tasks.description:
- In xmake.lua: change target name from "coconut-milk" to "coconut"
- Update set_basename on ocr-app and calculator-vue targets to "coconut"
- Update Justfile references (DEFAULT_TARGET, run, debug recipes)
- Update docs if they mention binary name
- Keep backward compat: create-coconut-app can still symlink as coconut

tasks.title: Add subcommand dispatch in main.cpp
tasks.description:
- Parse argv[1] to dispatch: "generate" → run generator, anything else → run app
- Structure: main.cpp checks if argc > 1 && argv[1] == "generate"
- If generate: call a new generate() function (or the generator's main logic)
- Otherwise: existing runtime startup (no behavior change)
- Keep argparse separate for each subcommand's flags (generate has --out-dir, run has --root --debug)

tasks.title: Absorb generator into coconut generate subcommand
tasks.description:
- Move generator logic from src/generators/main.cpp into a function callable from main.cpp
- Key improvement: use LuaRuntime to read project config (output_dir, command_root) instead of fragile configStringField() string parsing
- Generate for ALL commands/*.lua in one pass (not per-file), aggregate commands.d.ts naturally
- Keep src/generators/ files (command_definition.hpp, type_parser.hpp) as shared code
- Remove src/generators/main.cpp standalone entrypoint, or keep it as a compile-unit with the function

tasks.title: Remove coconut-milk-generators standalone target
tasks.description:
- Remove target("coconut-milk-generators") from xmake.lua
- Remove just run-gen recipe from Justfile (or redirect to coconut generate)
- Remove bin/coconut-milk-generators from .gitignore if present
- Keep src/generators/ directory and files — they compile as part of coconut binary

tasks.title: Update create-coconut-app: framework list, package manager prompt, vanilla default
tasks.description:
Changes to scripts/create-coconut-app (external Lua script, not absorbed into binary):

1. **Framework list**: { vanilla, react, vue, solid } — matches official create-vite templates
2. **Default framework**: vanilla (was vue) — less opinionated first experience
3. **Package manager prompt**: When vite template selected, prompt user to choose npm (default) or bun
4. **npm as default**: scaffold uses `npm create vite@latest . -- --template <fw>`; deps use `npm install`; dev server in README is `npm run dev`
5. **bun path**: `bunx create-vite@latest . --template <fw>`; `bun add vite@latest`; `bun install`; `bun run dev`
6. **README generation**: parameterized by pkg_manager instead of hardcoded bun
7. **bare / bare-ts untouched** — zero-toolchain, no changes
